text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ahhhh, my first winning concert is just around the
corner!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I wonder how it'll go—what it'll feel like!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
What if... What if I get to stand center stage my
very first time?!
choice_data_list: Let's not get too ahead of ourselves!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I knowww. But I can't calm down.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
If I stop talking for an instant, I think the nerves
might get the better of me!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
After all, there's no guarantee I won't totally mess
this up...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon can sing her heart out even if
nobody comes to watch, but apparently races are
different.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Do you really think so? Do you really think I can
win on dirt?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
This is my first step toward becoming a top
Umadol! And I'm gonna take it firing on all
cylinders! ☆
